'''bonafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:swaggerific|swaggerific]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swaggerific|swaggerific]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bonafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonafithi|bonafithi]] || [[word:bonafiji|bonafiji]] || [[word:bonafishi|bonafishi]] || [[word:bonafiki|bonafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonafuthuthu|bonafuthuthu]] || [[word:bonafujuju|bonafujuju]] || [[word:bonafushushu|bonafushushu]] || [[word:bonafukuku|bonafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonafuthu|bonafuthu]] || [[word:bonafuju|bonafuju]] || [[word:bonafushu|bonafushu]] || [[word:bonafuku|bonafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonafufthuf|bonafufthuf]] || [[word:bonafufjuf|bonafufjuf]] || [[word:bonafufshuf|bonafufshuf]] || [[word:bonafufkuf|bonafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonafethe|bonafethe]] || [[word:bonafeje|bonafeje]] || [[word:bonafeshe|bonafeshe]] || [[word:bonafeke|bonafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonafothotho|bonafothotho]] || [[word:bonafojojo|bonafojojo]] || [[word:bonafoshosho|bonafoshosho]] || [[word:bonafokoko|bonafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonafotho|bonafotho]] || [[word:bonafojo|bonafojo]] || [[word:bonafosho|bonafosho]] || [[word:bonafoko|bonafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonafofthof|bonafofthof]] || [[word:bonafofjof|bonafofjof]] || [[word:bonafofshof|bonafofshof]] || [[word:bonafofkof|bonafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfthĂŻf|bonafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfjĂŻf|bonafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfshĂŻf|bonafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfkĂŻf|bonafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|bonafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|bonafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|bonafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|bonafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfthĂŻf|bonafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfjĂŻf|bonafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfshĂŻf|bonafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfkĂŻf|bonafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfthĂŻf|bonafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfjĂŻf|bonafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfshĂŻf|bonafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bonafĂŻfkĂŻf|bonafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonafĂŠthĂŠ|bonafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bonafĂŠjĂŠ|bonafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bonafĂŠshĂŠ|bonafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bonafĂŠkĂŠ|bonafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonafathatha|bonafathatha]] || [[word:bonafajaja|bonafajaja]] || [[word:bonafashasha|bonafashasha]] || [[word:bonafakaka|bonafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonafatha|bonafatha]] || [[word:bonafaja|bonafaja]] || [[word:bonafasha|bonafasha]] || [[word:bonafaka|bonafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonafafthaf|bonafafthaf]] || [[word:bonafafjaf|bonafafjaf]] || [[word:bonafafshaf|bonafafshaf]] || [[word:bonafafkaf|bonafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bonafasha|bonafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bonafshĂ«sha|bonafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bonafrosha|bonafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bonafmusha|bonafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bonafyasha|bonafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobonafnkshĂ«sha|gobonafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobonafnkrosha|gobonafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobonafnkmusha|gobonafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobonafnkyasha|gobonafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bonanafasha|bonanafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bonanafshĂ«sha|bonanafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bonanafrosha|bonanafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bonanafmusha|bonanafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bonanafyasha|bonanafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobonanafnkshĂ«sha|gobonanafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobonanafnkrosha|gobonanafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobonanafnkmusha|gobonanafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobonanafnkyasha|gobonanafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:benĂŠfasha|benĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:benĂŠfshĂ«sha|benĂŠfshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:benĂŠfrosha|benĂŠfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:benĂŠfmusha|benĂŠfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:benĂŠfyasha|benĂŠfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobenĂŠfnkshĂ«sha|gobenĂŠfnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobenĂŠfnkrosha|gobenĂŠfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobenĂŠfnkmusha|gobenĂŠfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobenĂŠfnkyasha|gobenĂŠfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bonfafasha|bonfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bonfafshĂ«sha|bonfafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bonfafrosha|bonfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bonfafmusha|bonfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bonfafyasha|bonfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobonfafnkshĂ«sha|gobonfafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobonfafnkrosha|gobonfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobonfafnkmusha|gobonfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobonfafnkyasha|gobonfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
